sections.paragraph:
- Original: μακρός

- Transliteration: Makros

- Phonetic: mak-ros'

- Definition:

1. long

a. of place: remote, distant, far off

b. of time: long, long lasting

- Origin: from G3372

- TDNT entry: None

- Part(s) of speech: Adjective

- Strong's: From G3372; long (in place [distant] or time [neuter plural]): - far long.
